panel.description: Create invoices, receive payments, and get paid faster — all in one place.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your invoices.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start sending invoices in seconds.
register.termsNotice: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
register.successMessage: Account created. Please check your email to confirm your account.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.message: Please confirm your email before continuing.
confirmEmail.resendSuccess: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a secure password reset link.
forgotPassword.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a reset link sent to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.followLink: Follow the link to choose a new password.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your VegaPal account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.sessionExpired: Your reset link has expired. Please request a new password reset link.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
